title: nephelium cuspidatum var. bassacense
intro: Nephelium cuspidatum var. bassacense, also known as the Bassac rattan, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiproliferative effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Nephelium cuspidatum var. bassacense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
